canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating mobile agent capabilities, assessing step-wise task completion on Android platforms.
papers: OS-ATLAS: Foundation Action Model for Generalist GUI Agents
SPA-BENCH: A COMPREHENSIVE BENCHMARK FOR SMARTPHONE AGENT EVALUATION

definitions.text: A benchmark for evaluating mobile agent capabilities, assessing step-wise task completion on Android platforms.
definitions.paper: OS-ATLAS: Foundation Action Model for Generalist GUI Agents

definitions.text: A dataset and agent focused on cross-application GUI tasks, from which SPA-BENCH adapted its cross-app English tasks.
definitions.paper: SPA-BENCH: A COMPREHENSIVE BENCHMARK FOR SMARTPHONE AGENT EVALUATION

relationships.paper: OS-ATLAS: Foundation Action Model for Generalist GUI Agents
relationships.evidence: We examine five distinct agent benchmarks across three different platforms: AndroidControl (Li et al., 2024) and GUI-Odyssey (Lu et al., 2024a) for mobile agents; GUI-Act-Web (Chen et al., 2024a) and OmniAct-Web (Kapoor et al., 2024) for web agents; and OmniAct-Desktop for Windows environments.
